scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.train:collect: node -e "console.log('Use the app at http://localhost:3000, open Retrain dataset, choose hello/thanks/iloveyou, then click Save current sequence.')"
scripts.train:pilot-word10: node scripts/run-backend-python.mjs -m training.action_detection.train_action_detection_model --data-dir training/datasets/action_detection_word10 --output-model app/ml_models/action_detection/action-word10.h5 --actions yes no help good bad family work go drink school
